package rulecoverage

func NegativeEnvOrConfigLookupPerRequest() string {
    ruleID := "env_or_config_lookup_per_request"
    family := "gin"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Environment variable reads observed on request paths instead of cached configuration."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
